pi_items.source: Task description explicitly mandates saving as '/home/ga/aws_cloud_architecture.eddx', and verifier.py copies this exact path.
Task description explicitly mandates 'at least two pages', and verifier.py checks `page_count >= 2`.
Task description explicitly lists all these features. verifier.py enforces >= 2 pages, 3-tier architecture strings, AWS keywords (including vpc), and page 2 text content.
Task description starts with 'You are a Cloud Systems Architect'.
Task description asks for 'migrating its monolithic web application to AWS' and 'formal AWS cloud architecture diagram'.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new AWS cloud architecture diagram from scratch in EdrawMax. Verified the expected output path (/home/ga/aws_cloud_architecture.eddx), the requirement for 2 pages, and the necessary features (3-tier architecture, VPC networking, DR page, AWS shapes) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and are enforced by the verifier logic.
